---
title: Archiving 
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      toc-location: left
      page-layout: full
css: ./web.css
---

## Project Archiving using `tar`

Use the command `tar` to compress the hpcLaunch folder on UCloud. Check the size of the folder and compare the uncompress versus the compress version. 

Calculate the resources in time, transferring the compress versus the uncompress files locally. 

```
tar –ft mytarfile.tar 
```
